rules: Follow rules defined in AGENTS.md for breaking Next.js changes.
Always keep UI styles harmonious using CSS Glassmorphism and the Outfit/Inter google fonts.
Never use TailwindCSS unless explicitly requested; rely on vanilla CSS variables in global styles.
Port 8080/tcp is the unified Rest API and WebSocket gateway.
Maintain the high-performance PyTorch inference loop on local CUDA / CPU hardware.
Always calculate median_ms and p95_ms on gateway latency RTT rolling buffers (limit=30).
Keep the RuView Butterworth bandpass filters and autocorrelation peak detectors intact inside engine.py.
The primary DB is wifi_guardian.db in project root.
Verify table structures (vitals, activities, daily_summaries, events) before insertions.
Always catch SQLite exceptions to enable self-healing database restoration.
